title: Paul Gulacy
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
[[File:Paul_Gulacy.jpg|thumb|250px|Paul Gulacy]]
'''Paul Gulacy''' is an artist who pencilled the following [[Star Wars comic books|''Star Wars'' comic books]]:

*[[Crimson Empire 1|''Crimson Empire'' 1]]
*[[Crimson Empire 2|''Crimson Empire'' 2]]
*[[Crimson Empire 3|''Crimson Empire'' 3]]
*[[Crimson Empire 4|''Crimson Empire'' 4]]
*[[Crimson Empire 5|''Crimson Empire'' 5]]
*[[Crimson Empire 6|''Crimson Empire'' 6]]
*''[[Star Wars: Crimson Empire (TPB)]]''
*[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 1|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 1]]
*[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 2|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 2]]
*[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 3|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 3]]
*[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 4|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 4]]
*[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 5|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 5]]
*[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 6|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 6]]
*''[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood (TPB)]]''
*[[Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost 1|''Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost'' 1]]
